issue.title: Fix calculator add
issue.body: The `add` helper should return the arithmetic sum of two numbers. It currently behaves like subtraction.

comments.author: maintainer
comments.body: Keep the public function name unchanged.

plan: Update the add helper to use addition.

changes.content:
def add(left: int, right: int) -> int:
    return left + right

transcript: legacy mock: inspected calculator and changed subtraction to addition

plan: Patch the calculator helper in place.

changes.content:
def add(left: int, right: int) -> int:
    return left + right

transcript: pi mock: edited app/calculator.py and verified unittest target
